response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with deep expertise in the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization technologies. He perfectly hits the niche requirement for AI agent development (MCP) and possesses an outstanding background in software testing and architecture, making him a phenomenal fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes).
Direct experience with AI agent development and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Exceptional background in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD, including developing testing libraries and teaching courses.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Nest.js, though his deep Node.js and TypeScript expertise mitigates this.
Specific testing frameworks mentioned in the JD (Vitest, Playwright) are not listed, though he has broad equivalent framework knowledge.
Java experience is somewhat dated (2016-2018), which might require a brief ramp-up for secondary backend services.
